name: Newton, Smith
motto: "In class room and on the football ground, 'Nappy' tackles difficult work the whole year round, With all the managing he's done this year, He surely is trained for a shrewd financier."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Senior Class
text: "In class room and on the football ground, 'Nappy' tackles difficult work the whole year round, With all the managing he's done this year, He surely is trained for a shrewd financier."

name: Davis, Nicie Sue
motto: "Oh! but a man's reach should exceed his grasp; Or else what's a heaven for?"
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Senior Class
text: "Oh! but a man's reach should exceed his grasp; Or else what's a heaven for?"

name: Pearce, Odessa
motto: "Strong in will, rich in wisdom, Yet so lowly sweet, and a true Woman to her inmost heart."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Senior Class
text: "Strong in will, rich in wisdom, Yet so lowly sweet, and a true Woman to her inmost heart."

name: Chewning, Nannie Dee
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: A very capable maiden Is Nannie Dee Chewning, She is always very happy When with Larkin she is spooning.
text: A very capable maiden Is Nannie Dee Chewning, She is always very happy When with Larkin she is spooning.

name: King, Willie
motto: A little nonsense now and then Is relished by the wisest men. But only very solemn things Are ever relished by the Kings.
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
text: A little nonsense now and then Is relished by the wisest men. But only very solemn things Are ever relished by the Kings.

name: Tyson, Lillian
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Her countenance was radiant with rich and deep affections—for Donald.
text: Her countenance was radiant with rich and deep affections—for Donald.

name: Camp, Dolph
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: The sea of ambition is tempest tossed And your hopes may vanish like foam, But from your bright-eyed Florence Your thoughts will never roam.
text: The sea of ambition is tempest tossed And your hopes may vanish like foam, But from your bright-eyed Florence Your thoughts will never roam.

name: Wright, Ruth
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: If you admire real pretty things, Well, just look at Ruth Wright. For with her black curls hanging She's far from an ugly sight.
text: If you admire real pretty things, Well, just look at Ruth Wright. For with her black curls hanging She's far from an ugly sight.

name: Harris, Manila
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: He's a great big-hearted boy. He's the terror of the Yumas, But he's Lucile's greatest joy.
text: He's a great big-hearted boy. He's the terror of the Yumas, But he's Lucile's greatest joy.

name: Pearce, Ola
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Ola, where did you get your knowledge? Surely 'twas at Aggie College. Whatever you're asked to do, You do and quickly too.
text: Ola, where did you get your knowledge? Surely 'twas at Aggie College. Whatever you're asked to do, You do and quickly too.

name: Ford, Grace
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Grace is always very quiet, You'd think she wasn't in it, But when you try to balk her, You're surely up against it.
text: Grace is always very quiet, You'd think she wasn't in it, But when you try to balk her, You're surely up against it.

name: Crosswhite, Sam
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Sam Crosswhite is a ladies' man, He goes with his girl whenever he can. The girls ALL like him—just immensely, But there's one who loves him—O, intensely.
text: Sam Crosswhite is a ladies' man, He goes with his girl whenever he can. The girls ALL like him—just immensely, But there's one who loves him—O, intensely.

name: Huddleston, Vere L.
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Call Vere Huddleston, if you want Your chickens fed just right. He will watch them all day long, And stay with them at night.
text: Call Vere Huddleston, if you want Your chickens fed just right. He will watch them all day long, And stay with them at night.

name: Rogers, Olin
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Olin is a much admired boy who is going to be a farmer.
text: Olin is a much admired boy who is going to be a farmer.

name: Pearce, Faye
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: A very quiet and studious child Is plain little brown-eyed Faye. She comes to school and studies hard, She will be a good Senior some day.
text: A very quiet and studious child Is plain little brown-eyed Faye. She comes to school and studies hard, She will be a good Senior some day.

name: Shell, Frank
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Frank Shell is just a wonder, In more ways than one; He always knows his lessons, But he also likes some fun.
text: Frank Shell is just a wonder, In more ways than one; He always knows his lessons, But he also likes some fun.

name: Owen, Bobbye
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Junior Class
description: Bobbye Owen can wash the dishes, And she can sweep the floor; But if she beats Miss Gayne's time She will have to be a goer.
text: Bobbye Owen can wash the dishes, And she can sweep the floor; But if she beats Miss Gayne's time She will have to be a goer.

name: Lowe, Noel
motto: "Nature hath framed strange fellows in her day."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Nature hath framed strange fellows in her day."

name: Yocum, Florine
motto: "Always in for fun."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Always in for fun."

name: Furr, Floy
motto: "She worries not so much about the boys as about her algebra."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "She worries not so much about the boys as about her algebra."

name: Reid, Clara
motto: "She takes every fact of life with ponderous seriousness."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "She takes every fact of life with ponderous seriousness."

name: Crosswhite, Carl
motto: "His reasons are as two grains of wheat hidden in three bushels of chaff."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "His reasons are as two grains of wheat hidden in three bushels of chaff."

name: McCauley, Ora
motto: "Authority on table manners."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Authority on table manners."

name: Starling, Minnie
motto: "She needs no priming; she is pretty enough."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "She needs no priming; she is pretty enough."

name: Yocum, Lois
motto: "A genuine lady in every respect."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "A genuine lady in every respect."

name: McCallum, Carl
motto: "A real student, a friend in need, with an unwearied spirit in doing courtesies."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "A real student, a friend in need, with an unwearied spirit in doing courtesies."

name: Baker, Thelma
motto: "Appears to be a baby, but has the intellect of a Sophomore."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Appears to be a baby, but has the intellect of a Sophomore."

name: Booth, Mary Willie
motto: "She is amiable and lively, no one denies."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "She is amiable and lively, no one denies."

name: Patterson, Hattie
motto: "A master in the art of winning friends."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "A master in the art of winning friends."

name: Austin, Una Mae
motto: "A maiden modest, yet self-possessed."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "A maiden modest, yet self-possessed."

name: Hosier, Sam
motto: "When the roll is called up yonder, he'll be smiling."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "When the roll is called up yonder, he'll be smiling."

name: Crain, Florence
motto: "Noted for her intellectual powers and loveliness."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Noted for her intellectual powers and loveliness."

name: Parsons, Verda
motto: "Possessing a talent and love for music—and for Dorris."
major: THIRD DISTRICT AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, Sophomore Class
text: "Possessing a talent and love for music—and for Dorris."
